name: Yang Xiao Long: No More
description:
(REQUEST!) You're Yang's lover, but even that doesn't stop them from falling down the rabbit hole of hubris. At Vacuo, the girls keep pushing their own agenda into the battle plans of the final resistance, and it's only fair you finally had enough of Team RWBY's bullcrap of late and call them out on it.

creator: Jack4884
